official_functions.role: Construct the official Configuration clientbound store_cookie packet fixture
Write and read the official Configuration clientbound store_cookie body
Write and read the official byte-array payload inside the store_cookie body
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed store_cookie packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed store_cookie packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state
Read the decoded fields from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the store_cookie body.
The official ClientboundStoreCookiePacket.STREAM_CODEC writes Identifier key and byte-array payload fields.
The official ClientboundStoreCookiePacket.PAYLOAD_STREAM_CODEC limits payloads to the official byte-array codec surface.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundStoreCookiePacket.
The decoded official ClientboundStoreCookiePacket preserves Identifier key and payload bytes for this packet-support fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded fields, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove cookie storage policy, persistence, cookie request/response runtime behavior, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer cookie storage policy, persistence, cookie request/response runtime behavior, Configuration-to-Play readiness, Play readiness, or runtime behavior.
